lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Fandom — Federation/Ranks
sources.what: The 14-rank Federal Navy Auxiliary ladder and the ships/permits each Federal tier unlocks.

sources.label: Fandom — Empire/Ranks
sources.what: The 14-rank Imperial Navy Auxiliary ladder and the Imperial ships/permits each tier unlocks.

sources.label: Fandom — Reputation
sources.what: Reputation tiers (Allied→Hostile), the 75% Friendly floor, and how promotion missions unlock.

sources.label: NEWP
sources.what: Federation/Empire rank guide — the fastest-method routing (Empire courier loop, station rescues) behind Sections 9–12.

sources.label: Frontier Forums
sources.what: Pilots' Federation rank requirements — naval rank ladders and the ships/permits each tier unlocks.

sources.label: YouTube — TheYamiks
sources.what: Grinding Federation and Empire navy ranks to unlock the Federal Corvette and Imperial Cutter.

sources.label: YouTube — Down to Earth Astronomy
sources.what: Fast rank-up across both Empire and Federation navies via mission loops building reputation toward ascension missions.

sources.label: YouTube — Down to Earth Astronomy
sources.what: Federation rank grind using data-delivery missions to build reputation toward Federal Navy ascension missions.
